notes: Fixes the PWA update loop caused by mismatched app, service-worker, and release versions.
Registers a versioned service worker with network-only update checks and waits for activation before reloading.
Clears stale Cache Storage during service-worker install and activation while preserving IndexedDB log data.
Adds build-time version synchronization so future package releases keep all PWA version markers aligned.
Keeps the v95.93 DOT Mode runtime repair and the instant multi-event move controls.
label: v95.94 PWA update reliability
